name: autostereogram
title: Autostereogram — Magic Eye / SIRDS
description: A repeating-pattern field that hides a 3D depth map; the brain fuses it wall-eyed. GPU per-pixel pattern-shift approximation for real-time, plus a true Thimbleby/Inglis/Witten row-linking SIRDS on the CPU for export-quality stills.
renders: 320x200-class chunky aesthetic, nearest-neighbor upscale, CRT scanlines
pipeline: depth.frag -> depth map z(x,y) in [0,1] to FBO
stereogram.frag -> per-pixel horizontal pattern shift (GPU ~90% approximation)
sirds-cpu.js -> true row-linking SIRDS for export
